title: [Moonsu] Better, Beautiful and Optimized
description: Fully optimized and ready to play with friends via Essentials mod, including new features and shaders.
body:
##  A custom ModPack for better performance and an enriched experience!
![Insanity Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14fda360053d05631e37f8ed764609f205ae057e.png)
### If you prefer to play without shaders, enjoy beautiful skies with Hyper Realistic Sky!

**It also features dynamic lighting for those who like to light up with just a torch in hand.**

**Fully optimized and ready to play with friends via Essentials mod, including new features and shaders.**

### Features 2 manually configured shaders for a better experience: 
- **Insanity Shader**
- **Complementary Reimagined**

And other small improvements that will enrich your minecraft experience!

### Configured keys:
- **Advancements: L**
- **ShaderPacks Selection and enabled or disabled: K**
- **Enable or disable Better sky: B**
- **Emotes Wheel: R**
- **Zoom: C**

### Credits to the author of the mod that visually improves the grass and roads:[SuperBetterGrass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass) 

**I do not allow redistribution of this Modpack to other locations.**

**You can use this optimization Modpack for yours, as long as the modpack you make brings much more content.**

### Any doubt or suggestion write it in the Official discord.
